query:
INSERT INTO confidential_intents (dao_id, proposal_id, intent_payload, intent_type)
        VALUES ($1, -1, $2, 'auth')
        ON CONFLICT (dao_id, proposal_id) DO UPDATE SET
            intent_payload = EXCLUDED.intent_payload,
            intent_type = 'auth',
            status = 'pending',
            updated_at = NOW()
